name: Drafty Room
description: This is a small, drafty chamber at the base of a long vertical shaft. Air moves through here with purpose, suggesting the shaft above was meant to connect more than just floors. To the south is a standard passageway; to the east, a narrow corridor that looks like an afterthought. A heavy iron chain hangs down the center of the shaft, terminating in a metal basket, positioned precisely where someone once expected items to arrive or depart.
